title: Evangelion Faces
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Faces             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Oct 22, 2009 12:49 am With the variety of the Evas faces under their masks, do you think it is intentional that they were tinkering with their facial structure (for example trying to tinker with nostril holes, eye and camera function to improve efficiency), or do you think it is entirely random? I think it is random. I heard from somewhere that Unit-00 has 2 eyes and the "eye" on the front is a camera. If they were doing it intentionally they would probably make it have one eye. Then again it was the first functional one created so they could have had more control over the others' creation with the experience of making them. Your thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Oct 22, 2009 1:37 am Producers couldn't themselves decide how unmasked Evas look like. External mask appearance was added for variety. Seeing three exact Evas discernible only by color is dull, don't you think?

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Thu Oct 22, 2009 7:20 am I'm *pretty* sure unit 00 has 5 camera eye things behind that one big camera. I don't exactly remember at what point in the series you see this, but I recall checking this up after hearing about it in the wiki or something and confirming it. Perhaps episode 21?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 22, 2009 10:37 am You can see that in 23 (or possibly EOE), when Shinji gets a walking (or drive-by) tour of the boneyard. There's also a visible skull with two eye sockets. Granted, however, that those are failed prototypes... thus 00 might not be the same. It's all we have to go on though.

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Thu Oct 22, 2009 10:51 am toe mash wrote: Perhaps episode 21?

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Thu Oct 22, 2009 12:58 pm woohoo :p Maybe that sort of discredits the number of eyes on unit 00+01+02 = 1+2+4 = 7 eyes of god zomg!1! thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Oct 22, 2009 2:11 pm I believe that either 00 has 4 or zero "trying to remember what the great Reichu said". 01 of course has 2 of them and 02 has 4 eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Thu Oct 22, 2009 2:38 pm The thing I really wonder about is how/why the heck they went from the humanoid skull shape of 00-04 to the... whatever the MP Evas' heads are.

[]:             Quote Post by Agent_Koopa » Thu Oct 22, 2009 4:11 pm toe mash wrote: woohoo :p Maybe that sort of discredits the number of eyes on unit 00+01+02 = 1+2+4 = 7 eyes of god zomg!1! thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 22, 2009 4:28 pm There is a series of Eva figures that allow you to take off the armor and reveal (oh baby ) teh nekkid Eva underneath. From what I saw of those photos, Yui has 2 eyes, Rei1 has 1, and Kyoko has 2. I wish I wish had the actual images or some Reichu fanart on hand though, I could be remembering wrong in terms of the real eyes for Kyoko and Rei1. I at least know those 4 "eyes" on Kyoko is actually cameras, for quite some time I was under the impression they were eyes myself.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Oct 22, 2009 4:35 pm I have one of those figures and they are very amazing, a lot of the pieces are metal which is sweet. Evangelion 02 has 4 eyes on the head of this model.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Thu Oct 22, 2009 9:07 pm SSD, if I'm thinking of the same series of figures you are, the Eva-00 actually has NO eyes, strangely enough. And the Eva-02 has brown skin and green eyes, unlike the blue skin and orange eyes seen in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 22, 2009 9:15 pm felineki: Interesting. Thanks for clarifying.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Oct 22, 2009 10:57 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: felineki: Interesting. Thanks for clarifying.

[]:             Quote Post by Jesterhead » Fri Oct 23, 2009 8:52 pm Unit-02 does have 4 eyes. In episode 8 we see her open them while prying open Gaghiel's mouth Although they don't line up with the cameras.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Oct 23, 2009 9:45 pm Jesterhead wrote: Unit-02 does have 4 eyes. In episode 8 we see her open them while prying open Gaghiel's mouth.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Oct 23, 2009 10:12 pm The point of the topic is that do you think that it is intentional the way they grow the Evas' real facial structure, or do you think it is completely random? Such as the advantage of having 4 eyes or multiple nostrils if they made that on purpose.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Oct 23, 2009 10:39 pm I dunno, do the Kilingons make better fighters just because they have redundant organs? Real life example, Bull Dogs were breeded to have a small rear, giving them a smaller profile for anything to grab onto, and the flabbing skin folds on its face were intended to keep blood flowing away from their eyes, should they be injured. As to the Evas... no consistency, and no way of telling. The spike cannon however...

[]:             Quote Post by jayngfet » Tue Nov 10, 2009 7:27 pm I think it's random, the failed prototypes show much greater variety, going from a "standard" face with seven eyes to animal or humanoid skulls in some of them.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Nov 10, 2009 7:37 pm The prototypes certainly suggest randomness, and of course their deaths suggest just how difficult and uncertain the process of creating Evangelions really is. The graveyards in #23' and #25', as well as the generally "uncontrolled" nature of the Evas; in their growth and deployment. Nerv are dealing with unknown forces. Also, doesn't Unit-00 have two eyes? One in front and one on the top?

I think it is random. I heard from somewhere that Unit-00 has 2 eyes and the
